## Test plan

- [ ] `yarn test:ts`
- [ ] `yarn lint`
- [ ] `yarn test`
- [ ] `yarn test:e2e` (required for UI changes)
- [ ] `yarn format:check`
- [ ] Manual smoke — describe the flows you exercised:

## Screenshots / Recordings

## Linked issues

<!-- `Closes #123` or `Refs #123`. -->

## i18n

- [ ] New user-visible strings added to **both** `app/src/i18n/locales/en/` and `app/src/i18n/locales/de/`.
- [ ] No i18n changes in this PR.

## Breaking changes

<!--
If this PR introduces a breaking change, describe what breaks and the migration path.
Mark the commit with `!` and include a `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer in the commit body.
Delete this section if no breaking change.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits.
- [ ] Linked an issue (or opened one first for non-trivial work).
- [ ] Added / updated tests where sensible.
- [ ] Updated documentation where user-visible behavior changed.
